seoTitle: Wills vs Wilson Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wills and Wilson Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wills vs Wilson Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wills and Wilson Valley.
heading: Wills vs Wilson Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wills, Queensland and Wilson Valley, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wills has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Wilson Valley (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wills or Wilson Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wills has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Wilson Valley scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wills scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Wilson Valley scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wills or Wilson Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
